---
title: "Game Phase Analysis"
subtitle: "Opening, middlegame, and endgame performance"
---

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R", "functions.R"))
con <- get_site_db()
player_moves <- load_site_player_moves(con)
my_moves <- player_moves %>% filter(is_player_move)
```

## Phase Accuracy Overview

```{r phase-overview}
phase_acc <- calculate_phase_accuracy(my_moves)

phase_summary <- phase_acc %>%
  group_by(game_phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_accuracy = sd(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_ly(phase_summary, x = ~game_phase, y = ~mean_accuracy, type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = c("#2E86AB", "#f0d9b5", "#b58863")),
        error_y = list(array = ~sd_accuracy, color = "#adb5bd"),
        text = ~sprintf("%.1f%%", mean_accuracy),
        textposition = "outside",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>Accuracy: %{y:.1f}% ± %{error_y.array:.1f}%<extra></extra>") %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Average Accuracy by Game Phase", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    xaxis = list(title = "Game Phase", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Accuracy (%)", range = c(0, 105), gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd")
  )
```

## Phase Accuracy Over Time

```{r phase-trend}
phase_trend <- my_moves %>%
  filter(!is.na(centipawn_loss), !is.na(game_phase)) %>%
  group_by(game_id, date_played, game_phase) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = calculate_accuracy(mean(centipawn_loss, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(date_played) %>%
  group_by(game_phase) %>%
  mutate(
    game_num = row_number(),
    rolling_accuracy = slider::slide_dbl(accuracy, mean, .before = 9, .complete = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

phase_colors <- c("opening" = "#2E86AB", "middlegame" = "#f0d9b5", "endgame" = "#b58863")

p <- plot_ly()
for (phase in names(phase_colors)) {
  d <- phase_trend %>% filter(game_phase == phase)
  p <- p %>% add_trace(data = d, x = ~game_num, y = ~rolling_accuracy,
                        type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
                        name = str_to_title(phase),
                        line = list(color = phase_colors[phase], width = 2),
                        hovertemplate = paste0(str_to_title(phase),
                                               "<br>Game %{x}<br>Accuracy: %{y:.1f}%<extra></extra>"))
}

p %>% layout(
  title = list(text = "Rolling Phase Accuracy (10-game window)", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
  xaxis = list(title = "Game Number", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
  yaxis = list(title = "Accuracy (%)", range = c(0, 100), gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
  paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
  plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
  font = list(color = "#adb5bd"),
  legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15)
)
```

## Move Quality by Phase

```{r move-quality-phase}
phase_dist <- my_moves %>%
  filter(!is.na(centipawn_loss), !is.na(game_phase)) %>%
  mutate(move_quality = classify_move(centipawn_loss)) %>%
  count(game_phase, move_quality) %>%
  group_by(game_phase) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

move_colors <- c(
  "Best" = "#4CAF50", "Excellent" = "#8BC34A", "Good" = "#CDDC39",
  "Inaccuracy" = "#FFC107", "Mistake" = "#FF9800", "Blunder" = "#F44336", "Unknown" = "#9E9E9E"
)

p <- ggplot(phase_dist, aes(x = game_phase, y = pct, fill = move_quality)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = move_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Move Quality Distribution by Game Phase",
    x = "Game Phase",
    y = "Percentage (%)",
    fill = "Quality"
  )

ggplotly(p) %>%
  layout(
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2)
  )
```

## Critical Moments

```{r critical-moments}
library(DT)

critical <- identify_critical_moments(my_moves, min_cp_loss = 100)

if (nrow(critical) > 0) {
  critical %>%
    head(50) %>%
    mutate(
      centipawn_loss = round(centipawn_loss),
      eval_before = round(eval_before),
      eval_after = round(eval_after)
    ) %>%
    select(
      Phase = game_phase, Ply = ply_number, Color = color,
      Move = san, `CP Loss` = centipawn_loss,
      `Eval Before` = eval_before, `Eval After` = eval_after,
      `Best Move` = best_move
    ) %>%
    datatable(
      options = list(pageLength = 15, order = list(list(4, "desc"))),
      rownames = FALSE,
      class = "compact stripe",
      caption = "Top 50 critical moments (centipawn loss ≥ 100)"
    )
} else {
  cat("No critical moments found with centipawn loss ≥ 100.")
}
```

```{r cleanup}
disconnect_db(con)
```
